items.title: F-22 Flyover USMNT vs. Bosnia and Herzegovina / Plane Spotting
items.desc: I just had four F-22s fly over our house in the Silicon Valley area by Mountain View. Very low, probably Here are a couple of stills from the NBC News Bay Area video footage. Turns out figuring out exactly who they were is tougher than it looks. No PA release…

items.title: Kerala nurses save heart attack victim with CPR on road
items.desc: Kerala: Two nurses perform roadside CPR on 45-year-old heart attack victim near Kalady Bridge, rush him to hospital; stents implanted, stable.

items.title: Western Manitoba First Nation declares state of emergency as flooding sparks calls for federal aid
items.desc: Minegoziibe Anishinabe First Nation, in Manitoba’s flood-stricken Parkland area, has declared a state of emergency due to washed out infrastructure, joining more than 30 communities that have done the same.

items.title: ‘The Accidental Collector’: Herbert Lust Dead at 99
items.desc: Herbert Lust, a major collector of modern and contemporary art who befriended Alberto Giacometti, Robert Indiana, and other artists, died on May 12.

items.title: Katz: We must be ready to strike Iran whenever needed
items.desc: Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz said on Thursday that the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) must be prepared for "an independent 'blue and white' strike on Iran whenever necessary," according to a stat...

items.title: Climate awareness through puppet shows, Parai, and panel discussions
items.desc: Chennai’s Climate Action Month by CAG features walks, Parai performances, puppet shows and panels on e-waste accessories, waste, ocean science and green jobs.

items.title: NCP (SP) MP Amol Kolhe triggers defection buzz with 'Mahayuti' remark, issues clarification later
items.desc: NCP (SP) MP Amol Kolhe clarified his recent statement, asserting it was misinterpreted and referred to the Pune-Nashik railway project, not a political switch. His remarks had fueled speculation of defections to the Mahayuti, especially after recent party spl…

items.title: European Central Bank president Lagarde defends rate hike decision, and crypto markets are paying attention
items.desc:
The ECB's rate hike could shift global capital flows, impacting speculative markets, while future policy remains uncertain and data-driven.
The post European Central Bank president Lagarde defends rate hike decision, and crypto markets are paying attention ap…

items.title: DU Admissions: July 11 deadline to fill course and college preferences
items.desc: Delhi University UG admissions 2026-27: CSAS Phase I & II open till July 11; simulated ranks July 12; first allocation July 16; CUET-based seats.

items.title: Four criminals arrested for abducting developer & seeking Rs 1cr ransom
items.desc: Kolhapur police arrest four, including MCOCA-listed Ajit Tiwade, for abducting a real estate developer and demanding Rs 1 crore ransom; one accused absconding.

items.title: Right-Wingers Freak Out Over Mamdani’s Science-Backed AC Guidance: ‘Welcome To Communism People!’
items.desc: The New York City mayor's request to set thermostats at 78 degrees to avoid straining the power grid has the GOP acting like communism is taking over.

items.title: AUD commences UG admissions
items.desc: Dr BR Ambedkar University Delhi begins UG admissions for 2026-27 via CUET-UG 2026, offering 23 programmes and 1,194 seats; apply at aud.delhi.gov.in.

items.title: TNRERA Imposes Graded Penalties on Misleading Real Estate Ads
items.desc: TNRERA introduces graded fines for misleading real estate ads from July 1, 2026—up to ₹5 lakh for major violations, ₹1 lakh for minor; mandates RERA no./QR.

items.title: Catholic leaders urge Poland and Ukraine to pursue reconciliation, disarm language
items.desc: Catholic leaders from Poland and Ukraine issued a rare joint appeal for reconciliation, urging forgiveness, peace, and Christian unity amid rising historical and political tensions.

items.title: Central Arizona Irrigation and Drainage District Secures Up to 10,000 Acre-Feet Per Year of New Water Supply from Mojave
items.desc: CAIDD and Cadiz Inc. execute MOU for new water supplies to support long-term water reliability in Arizona PHOENIX and CADIZ, Calif., July 2, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Central Arizona Irrigation and Drainage District ("CAIDD") and Cadiz, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDZI, CDZIP) …

items.title: Derogatory remarks: HC refuses to quash case against Ponmudi
items.desc: Madras High Court refuses to quash defamation case against DMK leader K Ponmudi over alleged remarks on Shaivism, Vaishnavism and women; BJP councillor complaint pending.

items.title: Rally for Luxembourg teacher fired over pro-Gaza posts
items.desc: Students and supporters of a Luxembourg teacher fired over social media posts held a demonstration for her this week.

items.title: Kash Patel busted for quietly hiding his own big crypto bet that's tied to law enforcement contracts
items.desc: The FBI director is under scrutiny for failing to disclose a six-figure stock purchase in a bitcoin-based business that has done business with DOJ.

items.title: Ocasio-Cortez Backs Progressive in Key Michigan Senate Primary
items.desc: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is jumping into one of 2026's biggest Senate fights, throwing her weight behind Abdul El-Sayed in Michigan's Democratic primary and putting herself at odds with Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer. In her first endorsement in a conte…

items.title: New GI Joe Movie Update Reveals the 1980s Fan-Favorite Story It’s Based on
